texto: They look back and relixe that they learned much about Christian behavior an churchy experiences, but whatever they learned about Jesus didn't really change them. They never saw him so strikingly that he became their one, overriding hope and their greatest love. They were never convinced that Jesus is better - a zillion times better - than anything and everything else. Our goal must be for kids to catch this rock-their-world vision of Jesus.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jack Klumpenhower sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “They look back and relixe that they learned much about Christian behavior an churchy experiences,…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, gospel, kids, útil em momentos de mudanca e kids.
